title: nepeta nepalensis
intro: Nepeta nepalensis, also known as Himalayan catmint, is a perennial herb native to the Himalayan region. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic properties. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, including reducing anxiety and stress, improving sleep quality, and alleviating symptoms of irritable bowel syndrome. Nepeta nepalensis can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, making it a popular choice for natural remedies.
